fragments.content: Hello! How can I help you today? 😊

I'm doing great, thanks for asking! 😄  
Even though I don't have feelings like humans do, I'm fully charged and ready to help you with whatever you need.  

How about you—how are *you* doing today?
what do you think about kimi k.3

results.title: China's Moonshot AI claims Kimi K3 can rival OpenAI and Anthropic
results.snippet: The company launched Kimi K3, containing 2.8 trillion parameters, which serves as a measure of an AI's scale and processing power. Kimi K3's full capabilities – coding, knowledge work, and reasoning – will be known when it is released as an open-source model on 27 July.

results.title: 实测Kimi K3：强得意外，慢得着急
results.snippet: 综合各方测试来看，开发者们对Kimi K3的评价大多集中在这几个方面：3D和视觉生成能力最突出、前端UI的设计水准接近Fable 5、编码能力强但还没有超过最强闭源模型、速度是最大的短板。

results.title: 2.8万亿！全球参数最大的开源模型发布
results.snippet: 发布模型的北京月之暗面科技有限公司介绍，Kimi K3原生支持视觉理解，具备100万词元上下文窗口，面向软件工程、知识工作、深度研究、多模态理解等复杂任务场景进行优化，进一步提升了大模型复杂任务的处理能力。

results.title: Chinese AI model takes US tech industry by surprise with abilities rivaling Claude and ChatGPT
results.snippet: The newest Kimi K3 model from Beijing-based startup Moonshot ... appears to be catching up to the best versions of Anthropic’s Claude and OpenAI’s ChatGPT. ... Kimi K3 topped the charts on Arena’s ranking of what it calls “front-end coding capability,” which is one measure of an AI large language model’s performance.

results.title: The High-Priced Kimi K3: The Cash-Strapped Moonshot AI Uncovered
results.snippet: Others shared real-world testing experiences complaining that the model is overly verbose and the generated infographics lack aesthetic appeal. ... This is roughly the most accurate portrayal of K3's current state: it performs outstandingly on benchmark rankings, but its real-world work capabilities still need time to be fully validated.

results.title: Moonshot's Kimi K3 pushes boundaries of AI
results.snippet: K3 is aimed at long-horizon work rather than simple question answering. According to developers, it can process large software repositories, operate terminal tools and combine coding with visual feedback. Native image and video understanding also allows it to revise interfaces, games and other digital content after inspecting its own output.

results.title: Kimi 正式发布 K3 大模型，能力进阶；12.38 万，小鹏 MONA L03 大定破 4 万台；OpenAI 推出 AI 键盘 | 极客早知道 | 极客公园
results.snippet: 7 月 17 日消息，月之暗面（Moonshot AI）昨日（7 月 16 日）上线推出 Kimi K3 模型，是 Kimi 迄今能力最强的模型，拥有 2.8 万亿参数，100 万 Tokens 上下文，主要面向长程编程与端到端知识工作。

results.title: Moonshot AI unveils world's largest open-source model - EFE
results.snippet: According to the company, Kimi K3 is designed for long-context programming, complex reasoning, and knowledge-intensive tasks. The model is already available through the Kimi chatbot, the Kimi Work application, Kimi Code, and its API, while the full release of its model weights is scheduled for July 27.

results.title: Review: After the Hype Cools, Kimi K3 Fails to Convince in Rigorous Code Arena Benchmark
results.snippet: Kimi K3 拥有巨无霸版本的 2.8 万亿参数， 全球首个开源的 3 万亿级别模型。100 万 token 上下文， 原生支持视觉理解， 主打长程编程、知识工作和推理。

results.title: Kimi - Kimi K3 is Live App - App Store
results.snippet: run plugin-powered research, or ship a multiplayer AAA game from one prompt. # Key Features: - Kimi K3: 2.8T parameters. 1M context. It leads the field in coding, agentic tasks, long-horizon reasoning, visual understanding, and agent swarm capabilities. - Visual Agentic Slides...

results.title: Moonshot AI發表Kimi K3，效能逼近Claude與GPT最新模型
results.snippet: Moonshot AI將Kimi K3定位為「前沿智慧」（Frontier Intelligence）基礎模型，主要能力涵蓋程式開發、代理人、知識工作、推理及多模態理解，並強調可在較少人工介入下持續執行長時間、多步驟任務。

results.title: China’s Kimi K3 comes close to Fable benchmarks at one-third the token price
results.snippet: On July 16, K3 ranked first on Arena’s human-voted WebDev leaderboard with a score of 1679, ahead of Claude Fable 5 at 1631 and GPT-5.6 Sol at 1618. ... Kimi K3 may be relatively inexpensive by the token, although its real workload economics look closer to other frontier models. Operating K3 requires considerable data center infrastructure.

fragments.content:
Kimi K3 是最近 AI 领域一个相当引人注目的大模型，它凭借惊人的参数规模和不俗的跑分成绩，确实在行业内掀起了不小的波澜[citation:1][citation:4]。

### 💎 核心亮点：实力不容小觑

*   **参数规模惊人**：拥有 **2.8 万亿** 参数，是**全球参数最大的开源模型**。计划于7月27日开源，届时开发者能免费获取和修改[citation:1][citation:3][citation:8]。
*   **跑分名列前茅**：在考验前端编程能力的 **Code Arena 榜单上排名第一**，超过了 Claude Fable 5[citation:2][citation:4][citation:7]。综合实力也被评为全球第三，仅次于 GPT-5.6 Sol 和 Claude Fable 5[citation:2][citation:3][citation:6]。
*   **性价比突出**：虽然定价是国产模型里最贵的，但 API 输出价格（每百万tokens 100元/约15美元）远低于海外竞品（如 Claude Fable 5 输出价50美元）[citation:5][citation:6][citation:12]，主打错位竞争[citation:5]。

### 🧐 现实考验：“偏科生”的短板

尽管“成绩单”亮眼，但在实际使用中，Kimi K3 也暴露出一些明显的特点：

*   **审美与创意是优势**：在视觉生成、3D 交互和前端设计这些“看脸”的领域，用户普遍反馈其作品很有设计感和品味，甚至比 GPT-5.6 Sol 更有创意[citation:2][citation:9]。
*   **速度是最大短板**：这是被吐槽最多的地方。生成同样内容，K3 花费的时间通常是 GPT-5.6 Sol 的 **2到3倍**[citation:2][citation:5]。
*   **体验有待打磨**：做复杂任务很强，但有时面对简单问题会自作主张。同时高定价也让它面临一个尴尬处境——比它强的闭源模型品牌更响，比它便宜的开源模型也不少，定位夹在中间[citation:2][citation:5]。

总的来说，Kimi K3 展现了中国 AI 追赶顶尖水平的实力，它是一位**在编程和视觉设计上很有天赋的“快枪手”，但目前还缺少一些稳定性，更像是一个偏科的特长生**。
